definitions.text: To make full To add contents to so that it is full.
examples: She filled a glass with milk.

definitions.text: To add contents to so that it is full.
examples: She filled a glass with milk.
The doors opened and guests filled the auditorium.

definitions.text: A sufficient or more than sufficient amount.
examples: Don't feed him any more: he's had his fill.

definitions.text: An amount that fills a container.
examples: The mixer returned to the plant for another fill.

definitions.text: The filling of a container or area.
examples: That machine can do 20 fills per minute.
This paint program supports lines, circles, and textured fills.

definitions.text: One of the thills or shafts of a carriage.
